2606.24472.title: G$^3$VLA: Geometric inductive bias for Vision-Language-Action Models
2606.24472.paper_summary: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have made rapid progress in generalist robot manipulation by harnessing semantic knowledge from pretrained vision-language backbones, but their visual tokens remain grounded in 2D image coordinates rather than the calibrated geometry of the robot's cameras -- a mismatch especially pronounced in multi-camera setups, where views are coupled by known intrinsics and extrinsics yet processed as independent images. We propose G$^3$VLA, a camera-aware geometric module that injects calibrated structure into the visual-token stream of a pretrained VLA without altering its action space or imitation objective, combining intrinsic-conditioned ray embeddings, projective positional encoding (PRoPE), and bidirectional cross-view fusion. Geometric supervision is provided either from ground-truth point maps when available, or from confidence-gated $π^3$X teacher predictions, requiring no depth sensors or manual annotations. Instantiated on $π_0$, G$^3$VLA yields consistent gains across the LIBERO suites, RoboCasa24, RoboTwin2.0, and real-robot settings, with the largest improvements on spatially and object-sensitive tasks. We further validate on $π_{0.5}$ and GR00T 1.5, with results suggesting that geometric transfer is most effective when geometry-aware tokens have direct access to the action generation pathway. Our project page is at https://sites.google.com/view/g3vla
2606.24472.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言-行動 (VLA) 模型在通用機器人操作方面取得了快速進展，通過利用預訓練的視覺-語言骨幹中的語義知識，但它們的視覺標記仍然基於 2D 圖像坐標，而不是機器人相機的校準幾何結構——這在多相機設置中尤其明顯，在這種情況下，視圖由已知的內部和外部參數耦合，但仍然被處理為獨立的圖像。我們提出了 G$^3$VLA，一個相機感知的幾何模塊，它在不改變其行動空間或模仿目標的情況下，將校準結構注入預訓練 VLA 的視覺標記流中，結合了內部條件的光線嵌入、投影位置編碼 (PRoPE) 和雙向跨視圖融合。幾何監督要麼來自可用的真實點圖，要麼來自信心門控的 $π^3$X 教師預測，無需深度傳感器或手動標註。在 $π_0$ 上實現的 G$^3$VLA 在 LIBERO 套件、RoboCasa24、RoboTwin2.0 和真實機器人設置中均產生了一致的增益，對於空間和物體敏感的任務，改進幅度最大。我們進一步在 $π_{0.5}$ 和 GR00T 1.5 上進行驗證，結果表明，當幾何感知標記直接訪問行動生成路徑時，幾何轉移最為有效。我們的項目頁面位於 https://sites.google.com/view/g3vla
2606.24472.author: Yue Peng et.al.
2606.24472.authors: Yue Peng, Yongzhe Zhao, Artur Habuda, Khuyen Pham, Yanheng Zhu, Tran Nguyen Le, Fares Abu-Dakka, Li Guo
